name: Jinhui Shipping and Transportation Limited
summary: Jinhui Shipping and Transportation Limited, an investment holding company, engages in ship chartering and owning activities worldwide. The company provides ship management and shipping agent services. It is also involved in property investment and money lending activities. As of December 31, 2019, it owned a fleet of eighteen vessels. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Hong Kong, Hong Kong. Jinhui Shipping and Transportation Limited is a subsidiary of Jinhui Holdings Company Limited.
